seo.title: Reserve a Table — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Book your table at Grand Pavilion. Online reservations for dinner service and weekend brunch. Private dining for groups of 10 to 500.

hero.heading: Reserve Your Table
hero.subheading: Join us for dim sum, dinner, or a special celebration
hero.subheadingZh: 欢迎前来享用点心、晚餐或特别庆典

specialOccasionPrompt.heading: Planning a larger event?
specialOccasionPrompt.headingZh: 计划举办较大规模的活动？
specialOccasionPrompt.text: For parties of 20 or more, our private dining team can create a customized experience.
specialOccasionPrompt.textZh: 如需招待20位或以上宾客，我们的私人宴厅团队可为您提供专属定制服务。

notes: Walk-ins welcome for dim sum (subject to availability).
Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance.
For parties of 8+, please call us directly at (718) 555-0188.
notesZh: 点心时段欢迎直接到店（视座位情况而定）。
取消预约须在24小时前通知。
